name: Set Advisor Context
intent: Store my goals, principles, energy/capacity, and current situation as durable memory so my Personal Advisor can ground its advice in who I actually am.

seed.goals: Ship Krelvan's launch; protect deep-work mornings; stay healthy.
seed.principles: Say no to anything that doesn't serve the launch. Quality over quantity. Sustainable pace.
seed.energy: Limited — already at ~80% capacity this month.
seed.situation: Solo founder, two weeks from a public launch.

nodes.role: Persist the provided goals, principles, energy, and situation as durable semantic facts so the Personal Advisor can recall them. This is set once (and updated whenever your situation changes).
